name: Alex Rivera
reading_notes: The dominant release is a collaboration. Most of the value sits in a co-credited track, so the owner's realizable share depends on master/publishing splits a statement would confirm.
Big streams, smaller owned audience. The catalog leans on a breakout moment more than a dedicated fanbase — the clearest place to build durable value is converting listeners into followers.

roster.label: Example Label
roster.note: Neon Tide is one of several artists on the roster. The same baseline runs on any of them — a sample by Spotify following:
roster.cta: Want the same valuation + socials baseline for the rest of the roster? Reply and we'll run it.
